title: Kimchi Crisp Wrap
description: A spicy and crunchy Korean-inspired snack made with kimchi, crisp lettuce, and a hint of mustard.
instructions: Wash and dry crisp lettuce leaves.
Lay a crisp lettuce leaf flat and place a spoonful of kimchi in the center.
Fold the lettuce over the kimchi and serve with a side of Dijon mustard for dipping.
Enjoy as a crunchy and spicy snack!
